name: Archer
long_description:
Reward anything. Anywhere. Anytime.

Archer is a conversational AI platform that turns any event into an instant payout or physical reward. Define a behavior in plain English. Archer tracks it. Money and rewards move automatically.

We deploy AI agents with the ability to send payments and rewards globally using stablecoin and card rails. No dashboards. No manual ops. No engineering bottlenecks.

Launch referral programs, affiliate payouts, creator rewards, customer incentives, employee bonuses, loyalty campaigns, commissions, and automated treasury flows simply by describing what you want to happen. Archer handles the tracking, orchestration, and money movement underneath.
